title: Position of the secretary
doc_html:
§255. Position of the secretary

            The position of the secretary of veterans affairs as an officer of the state is established, as provided in R.S. 36:783 et seq.

            Acts 2019, No. 390, §1.
doc_text:
§255.  Position of the secretary
The position of the secretary of veterans affairs as an officer of the state is
established, as provided in R.S. 36:783 et seq.
Acts 2019, No. 390, §1.
